mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is flat or rising while CPIAUCSL remains elevated, markets infer persistent policy restraint and inflation stickiness; the 10-year Treasury yield rises over the next 20 trading days as term premia and expected path of short rates reprice upward.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day Treasury yield changes are negative in more than 60% of periods where FEDFUNDS is non-declining and CPIAUCSL is above its 6-month moving average.

mechanism_narrative: A fresh rise in UNRATE signals weakening labor demand and slower real activity; investors price lower growth and lower future policy rates, so the 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises >= 0.2pp from the prior monthly print
failure_condition: Reject if, after a UNRATE increase of at least 0.2 percentage points, the 20-day Treasury yield direction is positive in at least 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS falls while RSAFS also softens, the economy is losing payroll income and retail demand at the same time; the market shifts toward a growth scare, and the 10-year Treasury yield declines over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined PAYEMS-RSAFS weakness signal does not produce negative 20-day Treasury yield moves in at least 60% of triggered samples.

mechanism_narrative: A firming INDPRO reading together with stable or improving HOUST indicates resilient real-side supply activity and lower recession risk; this lifts long-rate expectations and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises >= 0.3% month over month and HOUST does not decline
failure_condition: Reject if the joint INDPRO-HOUST condition is met but 20-day Treasury yield changes are non-positive in more than 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: In a low-rate environment, a rise in CPIAUCSL above recent trend is interpreted as inflation pressure that erodes real returns and forces higher nominal long yields; the 10-year Treasury yield rises over the next 5 trading days as the inflation surprise is repriced quickly.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL is above its 3-month average and the latest monthly change is positive
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-upside trigger events are followed by negative or flat 5-day Treasury yield changes in a majority of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Strong quarterly GDPC1 growth combined with rising RSAFS confirms demand acceleration rather than inventory noise; that reduces recession pricing and lifts the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if periods of above-trend GDP plus rising retail sales fail to produce positive 60-day Treasury yield direction in at least 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: During a labor-market deterioration phase, a rising UNRATE paired with slowing PAYEMS causes investors to expect weaker consumption and earlier policy easing; the 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises >= 0.3pp over 3 months while PAYEMS growth turns negative
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor-deterioration trigger does not precede negative 60-day Treasury yield moves in at least 60% of occurrences.

mechanism_narrative: If INDPRO weakens while HOUST also contracts, the signal points to synchronized real-activity stagnation rather than sector rotation; investors price lower future growth and the 10-year Treasury yield declines over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO is below its 6-month average and HOUST is below its 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if the synchronized weakness condition is met but 20-day Treasury yield direction is positive in more than 55% of cases.
